name: side-nav
description: Collapsible sidebar navigation with optional icons and one level of grouping

meta.name: SideNav
meta.description: Collapsible sidebar navigation with optional icons and one level of grouping

props.name: items
props.description: { label, href?, icon?, active?, items?, onClick?, disabled?, tone?, trailing?, render? } — an onClick-only item renders a focusable <button>; nested items render expandable menus (links, action sub-items with onSelect/selected, separators, labels); render() is an alignment-preserving escape hatch

props.name: defaultCollapsed
props.description: Whether the rail is collapsed on first render (uncontrolled).

props.name: onCollapsedChange
props.description: Called with the new collapsed state when it changes.

props.name: collapseLabel
props.description: Accessible label for the collapse control.

props.name: expandLabel
props.description: Accessible label for the expand control.

props.name: expandOnHover
props.description: Widens the rail as an overlay on hover/focus-within; suppresses tooltips/flyouts

props.name: header
props.description: Content rendered above the items, inside the item padding context (e.g. app-context pickers)

props.name: footer
props.description: Content rendered above the collapse toggle (e.g. version string, user info)

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS class names merged onto the root element.

examples.title: Basic
examples.code: <SideNav items={[{ label: 'Home', href: '/', active: true }, { label: 'Reports', href: '/reports' }]} />

examples.title: Icon rail
examples.code: <SideNav collapsed items={[{ label: 'Home', href: '/', icon: <Home size={16} /> }]} />
examples.description: Collapsed rail: icons-only with tooltips, grapheme fallback for icon-less items, flyout menus for groups

examples.title: Expand on hover
examples.description: Rail widens as CSS overlay on hover without reflowing adjacent content

whenToUse: Persistent primary navigation along the side of an app shell
Grouping nav items one level deep with collapsible groups
Saving space with a collapsible icon rail (collapsed / expandOnHover)
whenNotToUse: Top-level horizontal navigation — use Header or ShellHeader nav
A transient contextual menu — use Dropdown

antiPatterns.bad: Nesting nav groups more than one level deep
antiPatterns.good: Flatten to a single level of grouping, or split into sections
antiPatterns.why: Deep nesting in a sidebar is hard to scan and the component supports only one level by design

related.name: ShellHeader
related.reason: The header hamburger toggles SideNav collapse

intent.a11yRationale: role="navigation" with an aria-label names the region; the collapse toggle has an explicit expand/collapse label, groups expose aria-expanded, and the collapsed rail provides tooltips/flyouts so icon-only items remain identifiable

flexibility.note: Rail behavior is configurable for density needs
Sizing, surfaces, and motion must resolve to --cascivo-* tokens
